name: @levnikolaevich/hex-line-mcp
description: Hash-verified file editing MCP + token efficiency hook for AI coding agents. 11 tools: read, edit, write, grep, outline, verify, directory_tree, file_info, setup_hooks, changes, bulk_replace.

_dep_notes.web-tree-sitter: Pinned ^0.25.0: v0.26 ABI incompatible with tree-sitter-wasms 0.1.x (built with tree-sitter-cli 0.20.8). Language.load() silently fails.
_dep_notes.zod: Pinned ^3.25.0: zod 4 breaks zod-to-json-schema (used by MCP SDK internally). Tool parameter descriptions not sent to clients. Revisit when MCP SDK switches to z.toJSONSchema().
_dep_notes.better-sqlite3: Optional. Used only by lib/graph-enrich.mjs for readonly access to hex-graph .codegraph/index.db. Graceful fallback if absent.

author: Lev Nikolaevich <https://github.com/levnikolaevich>
